name: cmg
documentation:
C++ Model Generation (CMG)
==========================

This package provides a command-line utility `cmg` and Python dataclasses to describe a schema, then use that schema to generate a model in C++.

You can use this for applications that require complex modeling and high performance.

The resulting code uses C++11 smart pointers for easier memory management.

## Schema Structure

The schema consists of a set of classes (`Klass`) which contain fields (`Field`).

A tree structure can be created using parent-child relationships (solid lines).
Then references can be created between classes in the DAG hierarchy (dotted lines).

![schema](assets/cmg.drawio.png)

## Examples

Please see the example schemas in the `examples` directory.

## API Documentation

[Full API documentation is available here](https://johndru-astrophysics.github.io/cmg).

functions.name: cmg.cli.cli
documentation: Generate code from a schema file.

modules.name: cmg.generator
documentation: A generator used to generate C++ based on a schema.

functions.name: cmg.generator.schema_loader
documentation: Load the schema module.

functions.name: cmg.generator.generate
documentation: Generate C++ code based on the schema.

modules.name: cmg.schema
documentation: A schema used to define the structure of the data in a model.

functions.name: cmg.schema.to_snake_case
documentation:
Convert a camelCase or PascalCase string to snake_case.

Args:
    name (str): The name to convert.

Returns:
    str: The name in snake_case.

functions.name: cmg.schema.to_camel_case
documentation:
Convert a snake_case string to camelCase.

Args:
    name (str): The name to convert.
    upper_first (bool): Whether to capitalize the first letter.

Returns:
    str: The name in camelCase.

classes.name: cmg.schema.Schema

methods.name: cmg.schema.Schema.link
documentation: Link the schema to its classes and fields.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Schema.get_klass
documentation:
Get a klass by name.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the klass.

Returns:
    Klass: The klass.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the klass is not found.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Schema.get_field
documentation:
Get a field by klass and field name.

Args:
    klass_name (str): The name of the klass.
    field_name (str): The name of the field.

Returns:
    Field: The field.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the field is not found.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Schema.get_cmakelists_src
documentation:
Get the source files for the CMakeLists.txt file.

Returns:
    str: The source files.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Schema.get_lcov_src
documentation:
Get the source files for the lcov command.

Returns:
    str: The source files.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Schema.get_test_includes
documentation:
Get the include statements for the test file.

Returns:
    List[str]: A list of include statements for each class in the test file.

A schema used to define the structure of the data in a model.

Attributes:
    name (str): The name of the schema.

    description (str): The description of the schema.

    namespace (str): The namespace of the schema.

    classes (List[Klass]): The classes in the schema.

classes.name: cmg.schema.Klass

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_include_define
documentation:
Get the include define for the class.

Returns:
    str: The include define.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_forward_declarations
documentation:
Get the forward declarations for the class.

Returns:
    List[str]: The forward declarations.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_forward_includes
documentation:
Get the forward includes for the class.

Returns:
    List[str]: The forward includes.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.to_snake_case
documentation:
Convert the class name to snake_case.

Returns:
    str: The class name in snake_case.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.init_fields
documentation:
Initialize the fields for the class.

Args:
    parents (bool): Whether to include parent fields.

Returns:
    List[Field]: The initialized fields.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_create_arguments
documentation:
Get the create arguments for the class.

Returns:
    str: The create arguments.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_example_arguments
documentation:
Get the example arguments for the class.

Returns:
    str: The example arguments.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_example_update_arguments
documentation:
Get the example update arguments for the class.

Returns:
    str: The example update arguments.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_ordered_fields
documentation:
Get the ordered fields for the class.

Returns:
    List[Field]: The ordered fields.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_updatable_fields
documentation:
Get the updatable fields for the class.

Returns:
    List[Field]: The updatable fields.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.link
documentation: Link the class to its fields and schema.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_var_name
documentation:
Get the variable name for the class.

Returns:
    str: The variable name.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.has_parent
documentation:
Check if the class has a parent.

Returns:
    bool: True if the class has a parent, False otherwise.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_create_ptr_type
documentation:
Get the create pointer type for the class.

Returns:
    str: The create pointer type.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_parent_fields
documentation:
Get the parent fields for the class.

Returns:
    List[Field]: The parent fields.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Klass.get_parent_field
documentation:
Get the parent field for the class.

Returns:
    Field: The parent field.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no parent field is found.

A class used to define the structure of the data in a model.

Attributes:
    name (str): The name of the class.

    description (str): The description of the class.

    fields (List[Field]): The fields in the class.

classes.name: cmg.schema.Field

methods.name: cmg.schema.Field.has_parent
documentation:
Check if the field has a parent.

Returns:
    bool: True if the field has a parent, False otherwise.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Field.has_default
documentation:
Check if the field has a default value.

Returns:
    bool: True if the field has a default value, False otherwise.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Field.to_camel_case
documentation:
Convert the field name to camelCase.

Args:
    upper_first (bool): Whether to capitalize the first letter.

Returns:
    str: The field name in camelCase.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Field.get_cpp_type
documentation:
Get the C++ type for the field.

Args:
    nolist (bool): Whether to exclude list types.
    cast (bool): Whether to cast the type.

Returns:
    str: The C++ type.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Field.is_reference
documentation:
Check if the field is a reference.

Returns:
    bool: True if the field is a reference, False otherwise.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the class or schema is not linked.

methods.name: cmg.schema.Field.get_example
documentation:
Get the example value for the field.

Returns:
    Any: The example value.

A field used to define the structure of the data in a model.

Attributes:
    name (str): The name of the field.

    description (str): The description of the field.

    type (str): The type of the field.

    example (Any): The example value of the field.

    default (Optional[Any]): The default value of the field.

    parent (Optional[str]): The parent of the field.

    is_child (bool): Whether the field is a child.

    is_list (bool): Whether the field is a list.

    is_optional (bool): Whether the field is optional.
